description_long: This is a military-style armored combat tactical vehicle with a robust, angular body painted in matte olive green. The vehicle features a reinforced exterior with visible armor plating covering the entire body, including sloped panels for deflection. It is equipped with four large, rugged off-road tires and two spare tires mounted on the sides. The roof has a circular hatch and two visible weapon mounts, one at the front and one at the rear, likely for machine guns or similar armaments. Additional details include external storage packs, a long radio antenna, and small windows with protective covers, all contributing to its utilitarian and defensive design.
description: Armored olive green combat tactical vehicle with sloped armor, off-road tires, roof hatches, and visible weapon mounts.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sloped armored windshield, two headlights, and the vehicle's robust, angular front profile.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the spare tire, side storage packs, and the roof hatch with a weapon mount.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the open rear hatch, rear storage packs, and the rear weapon mount.
description_view_3: Right side view displays three external storage packs, the spare tire, and the vehicle's angular armored body.
attribute_weapon_mounts: Two visible weapon mounts: one on the front roof and one on the rear roof, both suitable for machine guns.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with sloped, reinforced armor plating; thickness appears substantial, especially on the front and sides.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid olive green paint scheme with no visible camouflage pattern.
attribute_tire_type: Four large off-road tires with deep tread pattern and two visible spares; tires appear reinforced for rugged terrain.
